relations.note: Styling parameters must be applied to the verbatim copy text when layout rules are triggered.
Specifies inline typographic and coloring adjustments for particular letters inside the headline.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Maintain the exact approved FDA/MLR campaign tagline statement and brand name positioning.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup headline must read verbatim: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

quotes: Set in Agenda (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Ensure distinct and uniform visual structure of the core campaign headline across digital environments.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' must be set in Agenda (font.family.agenda = 'Agenda', with Nunito Sans ExtraBold as email fallback), using all caps always (campaign.headline.case = 'all_caps'), and left-aligned (alignment.campaign.headline_lockup = 'left-aligned') stacked over three lines in hero placements.

quotes: The letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Visually suggest the 'd' and 'm' of dermatomyositis within the campaign headline using designated brand colors.
rules.rule_text: The letters 'D' in DESERVE and 'M' in MORE must be styled with approximately a 40% tint (opacity.campaign.headline_char_tint = 0.4) of the main headline color in either of the two approved brand colorways: Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue.
